_comment: Human- and tooling-readable catalog of benchmark corpora. Descriptive only: the authoritative --suite -> corpus mapping lives in the SUITES map in run_benchmark.py. Keep the two in sync when adding a suite. See SCHEMA.md for the corpus file format.

suites.name: Competitive cross-tool benchmark
suites.description: Default. Union corpus across Slither, Semgrep (Decurity rules) and 4naly3er detector sets. Each category is findable by at least one compared tool; W3GoAudit runs the full vendored template set on every fixture.

suites.name: Slither-inspired detector parity
suites.description: Compares the real Slither tool with W3GoAudit's Slither-inspired port on the per-detector fixtures in fixtures/slither-detectors/.

suites.name: Decurity Semgrep Solidity security rule comparison
suites.description: Compares the vendored Decurity Semgrep rules (config/semgrep-decurity) with W3GoAudit's Decurity-inspired conversions on fixtures/decurity-semgrep-inspired/.

suites.name: 4naly3er-inspired detector parity
suites.description: Compares the real 4naly3er tool with W3GoAudit's 4naly3er-inspired port on fixtures/4naly3er-detectors/. Scope is 4naly3er High/Medium security issues.
